summary: Graphical application for personal financial accounting with multicurrency support, import/export, tags, budgets, debts, assets, and goals
description: Ledgera personal finance desktop app with multicurrency support, import and export flows, budgets, debts, assets, and reports.

This release extends the desktop updater contract: packaged Linux deb/rpm installs can now download a matching update package and hand installation off through a terminal flow, while AppImage and source-mode runtimes stay on the manual GitHub Releases path.
release_notes: Added in-app updater support for packaged Linux deb and rpm installs, including GitHub Release checks, package-kind matching, and streamed downloads into a user-scoped updates cache.
Packaged Linux updates now hand installation off through a terminal-based sudo apt install or sudo dnf install flow instead of relying on GUI package openers.
Updater release discovery is now prerelease-aware: stable builds ignore prereleases, while prerelease builds can see newer prereleases and then transition to the final stable release.
Source-mode Windows and Linux plus AppImage now stay on an explicit manual GitHub Releases path instead of pretending to support in-app installation.
GNOME Software may still omit license details or release notes for locally installed third-party packages even when AppStream metadata is bundled.
